frontMatter.title: Lambda and SAM Conversion in Kotlin - Part 1
frontMatter.summary: I love lambda expression. Whether it's in Java, Kotlin, or Javascript (arrow function). It helps me remove verbosity from my code

prev.title: Kotlin Coroutines - Introduction
prev.summary: Just like async/await in Javascript and C#, Kotlin Couroutines is trying to make asyncrhronous programming easier by enabling you to write async code with imperative style

next.title: Parsing HTML with jsoup
next.summary: Although a lot of my friends and colleagues use jsoup, i never had a chance to use it. It's my brain default to not choose Java as the language for parsing HTML.
